root_text.an6.68:1.1: “‘So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅgaṇikārāmo saṅgaṇikarato saṅgaṇikārāmataṁ anuyutto, gaṇārāmo gaṇarato gaṇārāmataṁ anuyutto, eko paviveke abhiramissatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an6.68:1.2: ‘Eko paviveke anabhiramanto cittassa nimittaṁ gahessatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an6.68:1.3: ‘Cittassa nimittaṁ agaṇhanto sammādiṭṭhiṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an6.68:1.4: ‘Sammādiṭṭhiṁ aparipūretvā sammāsamādhiṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an6.68:1.5: ‘Sammāsamādhiṁ aparipūretvā saṁyojanāni pajahissatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an6.68:1.6: ‘Saṁyojanāni appahāya nibbānaṁ sacchikarissatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an6.68:2.1: ‘So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu na saṅgaṇikārāmo na saṅgaṇikarato na saṅgaṇikārāmataṁ anuyutto, na gaṇārāmo na gaṇarato na gaṇārāmataṁ anuyutto, eko paviveke abhiramissatī’ti ṭhānametaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an6.68:2.2: ‘Eko paviveke abhiramanto cittassa nimittaṁ gahessatī’ti ṭhānametaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an6.68:2.3: ‘Cittassa nimittaṁ gaṇhanto sammādiṭṭhiṁ paripūressatī’ti ṭhānametaṁ vijjati.

translation_text.an6.68:1.1: “Mendicants, it is quite impossible that a mendicant who enjoys company and groups, who loves them and likes to enjoy them, should take pleasure in being alone in seclusion.
translation_text.an6.68:1.2: Without taking pleasure in being alone in seclusion, it’s impossible to learn the patterns of the mind.
translation_text.an6.68:1.3: Without learning the mind’s character, it’s impossible to fulfill right view.
translation_text.an6.68:1.4: Without fulfilling right view, it’s impossible to fulfill right immersion.
translation_text.an6.68:1.5: Without fulfilling right immersion, it’s impossible to give up the fetters.
translation_text.an6.68:1.6: Without giving up the fetters, it’s impossible to realize extinguishment.
translation_text.an6.68:2.1: It’s quite possible that a mendicant who doesn’t enjoy company and groups, who doesn’t love them and like to enjoy them, should take pleasure in being alone in seclusion.
translation_text.an6.68:2.2: For someone who takes pleasure in being alone in seclusion, it’s possible to learn the mind’s character.
translation_text.an6.68:2.3: For someone who learns the mind’s character, it’s possible to fulfill right view.
translation_text.an6.68:2.4: Having fulfilled right view, it’s possible to fulfill right immersion.
translation_text.an6.68:2.5: Having fulfilled right immersion, it’s possible to give up the fetters.
translation_text.an6.68:2.6: Having given up the fetters, it’s possible to realize extinguishment.”
